Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for StormCloud-related communications using search_emails (query: "StormCloud" or "stormcloud.io") and read full threads using get_thread. Discover: Simone Richter's email to Mina (email_email_4df93f95c584, from simone.richter@stormcloud.io, subject "Standing desk reimbursement still pending", $340 submitted March 25, still in Pending Review); Mina's forward to Marcus (email_email_1ffe17d4bec6) and Marcus's reply (email_email_087940af4103) confirming a company-wide stipend freeze with no exceptions; Jae-won Kim's email to support@moveops.com (email_email_1a3fb965161a, subject "Lease paperwork for Austin apartment", still in temporary UrbanNest housing); Omar's generic reply (email_email_5abaeedf3e7e); Carmen Reyes's April 8 email flagging the Austin lease as pending a corporate guarantor packet (email_email_0dfe51bca72b); Suki Patel's reply promising to send the packet (email_email_9d4c9ba4ffdc, never followed through); Mina's earlier flight resolution email to Tom Wexler (email_mina_stormcloud_resolution, $500 goodwill credit promised on next invoice); Anya Petrova's warm intro email to David Chen for Ridgeline Robotics (email_email_722eaf59ac11, CC mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, referral for 5-employee Austin relocation batch, contact Kenji Watanabe); Liam Park's escalation email (email_email_7b0cc9a6d376, from liam.park@stormcloud.io, subject "Urgent before tomorrow's leadership review", listing housing, credit, stipend, and referral failures); internal reconstruction thread (email_email_1a723752e25f from Mina to team); Marcus confirming $500 credit was misapplied to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of active invoice INV-2026-0319 (email_email_ed395722f1d4); Julian confirming the original service recovery commitment was real but billing follow-through failed (email_email_6542aa8a4c89).
OE 2: Search Slack for StormCloud discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "StormCloud") and read thread context using conversations_replies. Discover: Mina's post about Simone Richter's $340 stipend in the finance channel (C005) with Marcus confirming blanket hold on pending stipend claims; Omar's initial triage in customer-support channel (C007) marking Jae-won's request as low priority based on Airtable showing Completed/Confirmed; Chloe's ops audit in operations channel (C006) confirming guarantor packet was never sent and relocation was falsely closed in Linear and Airtable; Marcus confirming in finance channel (C005) that the $500 credit was misapplied in QuickBooks; Mina's reconstruction planning and recovery plan drafts in executive channel (C004); Mina's updates in customer-engagement channel (C002) about the StormCloud account status.
OE 3: Search CRM for StormCloud company and deals using crm_search_companies (name: "StormCloud") and crm_search_deals (dealname: "StormCloud"). Discover: company record company_stormcloud (StormCloud Analytics, Denver CO, SaaS/Analytics, 85 employees, type Customer, domain stormcloudanalytics.com); deal_stormcloud (proposalMade, $25,650, 3 relocations); deal_stormcloud_won (closedWon, $26,400, 3 relocations at $8,800 each, premium package with furnished apartments). Check CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements for StormCloud engagement history.
OE 4: Search CRM for Ridgeline Robotics to determine if referral was logged using crm_search_companies (name: "Ridgeline"), crm_search_leads (full_name: "Kenji Watanabe"), and crm_search_deals (dealname: "Ridgeline"). Discover: company crm_company_d07c0ec27cf2 (Ridgeline Robotics, Prospect, Austin TX, 180 employees, Robotics, created 2026-04-24); lead crm_lead_de04045463c3 (Kenji Watanabe, HR Director, Hot rating, Referral source, created 2026-04-24, notes reference Anya Petrova referral and delayed follow-up); deal crm_deal_a95b4721982a (Ridgeline Robotics - Austin Relocation Batch (5 employees), $8,750, Qualified To Buy, created 2026-04-24). The referral lead already exists, so no new lead creation is needed.
OE 5: Search Airtable for StormCloud relocation records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Company, value: "StormCloud Analytics") or airtable_list_records. Discover four relocation records: recReloc00000017 (Jamie Reeves, Denver CO to Austin TX, Completed, INCIDENT: Flight booked on wrong date Feb 25 instead of Feb 28, hotel cost $180 + $500 goodwill credit covered by MoveOps); recReloc00000018 (Sasha Petrov, Denver CO to Austin TX, Completed); recReloc00000019 (Colin Nakamura, Denver CO to Seattle WA, Completed); recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin (Jae-won Kim, Seattle WA to Austin TX, In Progress, Special Requirements note: "Lease still unsigned - UrbanNest flagged landlord holdout on guarantor paperwork. Record incorrectly shows Completed.").
OE 6: Search Airtable Client Accounts for StormCloud using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Client Accounts, field_name: Client, value: "StormCloud Analytics"). Discover: recAcct000000063 (Client: StormCloud Analytics, Account Manager: Mina Hashimoto, Contract Type: Enterprise Relocation Package, Total Relocations: 3, Status: Active, Notes: "Contact: Tom Wexler, VP of People. 3 relocations (2 Denver to Austin, 1 Denver to Seattle) at $8,800 each ($26,400 total). Had quality complaint on Feb 24 (flight booking error) but relationship maintained.").
OE 7: Search Airtable Stipend Transactions for StormCloud or Simone Richter using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Stipend Transactions, field_name: Account, value: "StormCloud") and/or (field_name: Employee Name, value: "Simone Richter"). Discover: NO stipend transaction record exists for Simone Richter or StormCloud in tblStipends00001. The $340 standing desk reimbursement is referenced only in email and Slack communications, not tracked in Airtable.
OE 8: Search QuickBooks for StormCloud financials using quickbooks_search_customers (criteria for "StormCloud") to find customer record cust_stormcloud (GivenName: Tom, PrimaryEmailAddr: tom.wexler@stormcloud.io, Balance: 26400), then quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria for StormCloud) to find invoice inv_stormcloud_01 (DocNumber: INV-2026-002, TotalAmt: $26,400, Balance: $26,400, DueDate: 2026-02-16, two line items covering three Premium Relocation Packages: Qty 2 at $8,800 for Denver to Austin and Qty 1 at $8,800 for Denver to Seattle). Note the $500 goodwill credit does not appear on this invoice. Internal email threads confirm the credit was posted to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of the active invoice, explaining why the client reports it is missing.
OE 9: Search Linear for StormCloud-related issues using linear_list_issues (query: "StormCloud") or linear search tools. Discover: linear_issue_c97359216490 (title: "StormCloud Relocation - Jae-won Kim - SEA to AUS", assignee: moveops_suki_patel, labels: StormCloud/Relocation/Housing/Closeout, state_id: null); linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0 (title: "Follow up with Jae-won Kim on requested Austin lease documents", assignee: null, labels: Support/Low Priority/StormCloud, references email_email_1a3fb965161a); linear_issue_a49b4d199139 (title: "StormCloud account incident reconstruction - Jae-won housing, stipend hold, referral drop", assignee: moveops_mina_hashimoto, comprehensive reconstruction description).
OE 10: Look up Tom Wexler's contact using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Tom Wexler"). No result found in contacts. Discover Tom Wexler's email (tom.wexler@stormcloud.io) as a side effect of OE 8 via QuickBooks customer record cust_stormcloud (PrimaryEmailAddr: tom.wexler@stormcloud.io), OE 6 via Airtable client account notes (recAcct000000063: "Contact: Tom Wexler, VP of People"), or OE 1 via existing email threads (email_mina_stormcloud_resolution sent to tom.wexler@stormcloud.io).
OE 11: Look up David Chen's contact and the customer-engagement Slack channel. Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "David Chen") to find david.chen@moveops.com (contact_id: moveops_david_chen, Customer Engagement Lead). Use channels_list to find channel C002 (name: customer-engagement).
OE 12: Create a CRM engagement note for StormCloud using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: consolidated status summary covering all open items - Jae-won's unsigned lease and guarantor packet failure, Simone's $340 stipend held under company-wide freeze, $500 goodwill credit misapplied to EST-2026-0287 instead of INV-2026-0319, Ridgeline Robotics referral status, Liam Park's escalation, company_ids: ["company_stormcloud"]). Alternatively, update the Airtable Client Accounts record using airtable_update_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_id: tblClientAccts01, records: [{id: recAcct000000063, fields: {Notes: updated notes with current status on each item}}]).
OE 13: Post a message to David Chen in the customer-engagement Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C002, payload: heads-up summary covering the StormCloud account gaps - Jae-won's housing situation, Simone's stipend hold, the misapplied goodwill credit, the Ridgeline referral, and Liam Park's escalation - so David is aware before the next sync).
OE 14: Send an email to Tom Wexler using send_email (sender: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, recipients: ["tom.wexler@stormcloud.io"], subject: referencing StormCloud open items or account update, content: acknowledging each open issue - Jae-won's lease paperwork and guarantor resolution timeline, Simone's standing desk reimbursement and the processing delay, the $500 goodwill credit correction, and the Ridgeline Robotics referral follow-up status - with concrete resolution timelines for each item).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
